summary: ANDROID| Falcon | Custom EQ - Save button do not work for Falcon Custom
scenario: Custom EQ slider settings are not saved after pressing Save EQ on Falcon device in Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: When a user sets Custom EQ sliders for a Falcon device and clicks the Save EQ button (confirming with the dialog), the slider settings are not saved. Upon reopening the Custom EQ settings, the sliders revert to default values. Expected behavior: Custom EQ slider settings should be saved after pressing Save EQ. Additionally, there is a minor issue with the dialog description text that needs fixing.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected Falcon device to enter Device Settings.
5. Adjust one or more EQ sliders to non-default values.
7. In the confirmation dialog, tap Confirm (or equivalent affirmative action).
8. Close the Custom EQ settings screen.
9. Reopen Audio Settings → Equalizer → Custom EQ.
expected: Custom EQ slider settings should be saved after pressing Save EQ. Upon reopening Custom EQ, the sliders should retain the previously saved values.
actual: Custom EQ slider settings are not saved. Upon reopening Custom EQ, the sliders revert to default values. Additionally, the dialog description text has a minor issue that needs fixing.
